featureDescription: Shopping cart checkout flow with Stripe payment integration

artifacts.content:
# Test Strategy: Shopping Cart Checkout Flow

## Executive Summary
This strategy covers the checkout flow from cart to payment confirmation, focusing on Stripe integration risk areas.

## Risk Assessment Matrix

| Area | Risk | Impact | Priority |
|------|------|--------|----------|
| Payment Processing | Critical | Revenue loss | P0 |
| Cart Edge Cases | High | UX degradation | P1 |
| Order Confirmation | Medium | Customer confusion | P2 |

## Equivalence Partition Tables

### Cart Quantity
| Partition | Values | Expected |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| Valid low | 1 | Accept |
| Valid mid | 5 | Accept |
| Valid high | 99 | Accept |
| Boundary | 0 | Reject |
| Boundary | 100 | Reject |
| Invalid | -1 | Reject |

### Payment Amount
| Partition | Values | Expected |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| Minimum | $0.50 | Accept (Stripe min) |
| Typical | $49.99 | Accept |
| High | $9,999 | Accept |
| Over limit | $10,001 | Flag for review |

## Test Types
- **Unit:** Cart calculations, coupon logic
- **Integration:** Stripe API, webhook handling
- **E2E:** Full checkout flow, error recovery

## Entry/Exit Criteria
- Entry: Feature branch deployed to staging
- Exit: All P0/P1 tests passing, >90% coverage on payment module

@priority-critical @risk-high
Feature: Shopping Cart Checkout
  As a customer
  I want to complete my purchase
  So that I receive my ordered items

  Background:
    Given I have items in my cart
    And I am on the checkout page

  @priority-critical
  Scenario: Successful payment with valid card
    When I enter valid card details
    And I click "Pay Now"
    Then the payment should be processed
    And I should see the order confirmation page
    And I should receive a confirmation email

  @priority-critical
  Scenario: Payment failure with declined card
    When I enter a declined card number
    And I click "Pay Now"
    Then I should see an error message "Payment declined"
    And my cart should remain intact
    And no order should be created

  @priority-high
  Scenario Outline: Cart quantity boundaries
    When I set item quantity to <quantity>
    Then the cart should show <result>

    Examples:
      | quantity | result          |
      | 1        | accepted        |
      | 99       | accepted        |
      | 0        | validation error|
      | 100      | validation error|
      | -1       | validation error|
